name: io.github.n24q02m/better-code-review-graph
description: Knowledge graph for token-efficient code reviews with fixed search and configurable embeddings

environmentVariables.description: Embedding backend override: 'local' (qwen3-embed ONNX) or 'litellm' (cloud). Auto-detected if omitted.
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_BACKEND

environmentVariables.description: API keys for LiteLLM cloud embedding (format: ENV_VAR:key). Enables LiteLLM backend.
environmentVariables.name: API_KEYS

environmentVariables.description: LiteLLM Proxy URL for self-hosted gateway. Enables LiteLLM backend via proxy.
environmentVariables.name: LITELLM_PROXY_URL

environmentVariables.description: API keys for LiteLLM cloud embedding (format: ENV_VAR:key)
environmentVariables.name: API_KEYS
